## Jefferies Raises ASML Price Target Citing Constructive Semiconductor Sector Outlook

A Jefferies PT raise on ASML is a direct vote of confidence in the litho capex cycle; as the most concentrated single-name play on front-end semiconductor capacity expansion, a constructive ASML view is a broad bullish signal for the semi supply chain.

- Jefferies has raised its price target on ASML.
- Rationale is a positive view on the semiconductor sector broadly, not ASML-specific news.
- Directly supports a constructive read on lithography capex demand.
- A sell-side PT raise grounded in cycle outlook rather than company-specific catalyst.
